message:
feat(h2): optimize Huffman decoder and add security stress tests

Replace O(n×257) linear-scan Huffman decoder with fast-path match
tables for 5/6/7/8-bit codes (covers most ASCII), falling back to
length-filtered scan for 9-30 bit codes. This prevents CPU exhaustion
attacks via crafted compressed headers (bd-tiq8).

Add 8 security stress tests for HPACK: malformed integers, random
Huffman bytes, dynamic table churn, random header blocks, full byte
coverage, long-code symbols, and integer prefix/value combos (bd-1z7e).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
